entries.title: Ghostwriter v0.4: one clean card family, terminal code cards, and a portrait carousel
entries.summary: Shipped ghostwriter v0.4.0: redesigned the LinkedIn image cards into one clean, consistent family, added a terminal code-snippet card and a Claude Code session card, and rebuilt the carousel as a portrait, research-backed document (the 4:5 sizing flagged as next in v0.3).

entries.title: Ghostwriter v0.3: a LinkedIn reach playbook, flow diagrams, and carousels
entries.summary: Shipped ghostwriter v0.3.0 — researched the LinkedIn algorithm and baked a sourced reach playbook into the skill, added a clean flow-diagram card type, and built end-to-end carousel support (PDFs that LinkedIn renders as swipeable slides), verified by publishing one live.

entries.title: Added a ramp card type to the ghostwriter for accelerating progressions
entries.summary: Ported an unmerged feature into the consolidated repo via PR: a new 'ramp' visual card — three ascending steps with the last highlighted — for posts about momentum and acceleration.

entries.title: Treating the LinkedIn skill as code: evals, 100% test coverage, and v0.0.1
entries.summary: Made the ghostwriter skill follow its own advice — a skill is code, so I scored its SKILL.md, brought every script to 100% test coverage behind a CI gate, and cut the first versioned release.

entries.title: Optional diagrams and a per-user brand guide for the LinkedIn ghostwriter
entries.summary: Added opt-in image generation — Mermaid diagrams and designed cards, rendered locally — to the LinkedIn ghostwriter, plus a personal brand guide that auto-applies your byline.
